name: Lisata Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Lisata Therapeutics Inc. (formerly Caladrius Biosciences, Inc.) is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of innovative therapies designed to transform the standard of care for the treatment of cancer. The company is developing LSTA1, a novel investigational agent designed to activate a unique uptake pathway that allows anti-cancer therapies to target solid tumors more effectively. Lisata Therapeutics is headquartered in Basking Ridge, New Jersey.
